name: Find Pairs with Given Sum in Sorted DLL
description: Given a sorted doubly linked list and a target sum, find all pairs of nodes whose values add up to the target. Use two pointers from both ends.
constraints: 1 <= number of nodes <= 10^4. 1 <= Node.val <= 10^4. List is sorted in ascending order.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long sorted doubly linked lists that punish quadratic pair enumeration instead of a two-pointer sweep
